item.title: Eating 3.5kg of Ribs in 30 Minutes Challenge
item.description: Watch an extreme food challenge as 3.5kg of ribs are devoured in just 30 minutes, testing appetite, speed, and endurance in this intense eating attempt.

media:content.media:title: Eating 3.5kg of Ribs in 30 Minutes Challenge
media:content.media:description: Watch an extreme food challenge as 3.5kg of ribs are devoured in just 30 minutes, testing appetite, speed, and endurance in this intense eating attempt.

item.title: Free Hotel Breakfast: Scam or Win?
item.description: We break down whether free hotel breakfasts are truly a benefit or just a marketing tactic, helping you decide if it’s worth it during your stay.

media:content.media:title: Free Hotel Breakfast: Scam or Win?
media:content.media:description: We break down whether free hotel breakfasts are truly a benefit or just a marketing tactic, helping you decide if it’s worth it during your stay.

item.title: Inside South Dakota's Corn Palace
item.description: Explore the iconic Corn Palace in South Dakota, famous for its intricate corn murals and unique architecture that attracts visitors year-round.

media:content.media:title: Inside South Dakota's Corn Palace
media:content.media:description: Explore the iconic Corn Palace in South Dakota, famous for its intricate corn murals and unique architecture that attracts visitors year-round.

item.title: Eating 5 Pounds of Chicken Lips Challenge
item.description: Watch an extreme food challenge as 5 pounds of chicken lips are devoured, testing limits and taste in this unique and daring eating experience.

media:content.media:title: Eating 5 Pounds of Chicken Lips Challenge
media:content.media:description: Watch an extreme food challenge as 5 pounds of chicken lips are devoured, testing limits and taste in this unique and daring eating experience.

item.title: How to Make $1,000 in 10 Minutes
item.description: Learn quick strategies to earn $1,000 in just 10 minutes with tips and methods shared by KC Finn for fast, practical income opportunities.

media:content.media:title: How to Make $1,000 in 10 Minutes
media:content.media:description: Learn quick strategies to earn $1,000 in just 10 minutes with tips and methods shared by KC Finn for fast, practical income opportunities.

item.title: Bigfoot Burger Challenge: Huge Burger Attempt
item.description: Watch the ultimate burger challenge as we take on the massive Bigfoot Burger, testing appetite and limits in this epic food experience.

media:content.media:description: Watch the ultimate burger challenge as we take on the massive Bigfoot Burger, testing appetite and limits in this epic food experience.

item.title: Food Challenge: How Fast Can I Finish?
item.description: Take on a timed food challenge to see how quickly a full meal can be finished, testing speed, appetite, and endurance.

media:content.media:title: Food Challenge: How Fast Can I Finish?
media:content.media:description: Take on a timed food challenge to see how quickly a full meal can be finished, testing speed, appetite, and endurance.
